failedPrompts.query: My skin looks good some days but terrible others what am I doing wrong

failedPrompts.query: What ingredients should I look for in skincare for sensitive acne prone skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Look for niacinamide, ceramides, and centella asiatica to strengthen barriers; avoid fragrance, essential oils, and high-concentration acids. Salicylic acid at 0.5-2% is safe for sensitive acne-prone skin when introduced slowly, but start with barrier repair first.
